content:
But that's my take, and maybe I'm completely delusional. And maybe nothing said or done has any meaning.

Either way, we did just meet last week.

And while I do trust my instincts with recognition of another's soul and whether there's compatibility with my soul or not, and do believe we would have good times and live comfortably together....

I cannot be the person you kill time with when you're being discarded by a person who doesn't seem to value you.

You are doing to me what is being done to you, essentially. Discarding the person who is showing genuine interest in you.

Anyway, I've gone on long enough.

Let me know if you'd like to talk, or see me, or drive to Florida, or cook you authentic Italian pasta sauce, or start a band, or help with my business, or live together when I find a place in the next few weeks.
context: From document: Hey, good luck tonight. Be safe. It hurts me to see you so upset, and… — chunk 3 (chunk 3/3)
